title: Spectacular Sponges
description: Adds more sponges to the game to make cleaning up your world so much easier! (Also adds a cool new nether biome where lava sponges come from)
body: This mod adds 3 new sponges: Lava Sponge, Plant Sponge, and Snow Sponge. Allowing for players to clean up any thing in their way. Wether its lava, snow, or plants! This mod also adds a new nether biome called the Bubblin Forest. This is where the lava sponges come from. In this biome bubblin corrupted piglins and hoglins live here: Bubblinified Piglin, Bubblohog. So have fun exploring and absorbing!
